generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a woman who values security, I've been concerned about our over-reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure. Did you know that 72% of our allies have already implemented domestic production mandates for key defense systems? It's not about isolation - it's about ensuring we can protect ourselves when it matters most. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurityFirst
